body:
**Status:** Draft. Do not merge until WebGPT accepts the R3 evidence bundle.

## Scope

First landing of `/review-extraction` in `agent-skills/main`. Adds:

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `skills/review-extraction/SKILL.md` | v2 schema + contracts (Collaboration model, 7-step protocol, Review output format with 9-item Complete plan, Complete plan requirements, Iteration stop conditions, blocked_on payload, Loop convergence, Iterative extraction-fix loop, Closure rule, Hard rules, Relationships to /review-code and best-practices) |
| `skills/review-extraction/scripts/build_golden_slice_bundle.py` | Deterministic bundle runner: page-only release-mode extraction, evidence rendering, precedence matcher, 4-bucket comparison, manifest v2 with 4 split mutation flags, optional_code/, blocked_on validator |
| `skills/review-extraction/README.md` | One-line pointer (from upstream zip) |
| `skills/review-extraction/UPSTREAM_MANIFEST.json` | Provenance (renamed from MANIFEST.json to avoid colliding with per-bundle manifests) |

## What's NOT in this PR

- No pdf_oxide / extractor changes
- No NIST preset / ledger changes
- No closure-matrix changes
- No LLM call
- No batch run

## Tests

Pinned in companion PR **grahama1970/pdf_oxide#1** (`pdf-oxide/gs001-r3-runner-tests`) — 17 cases covering manifest split flags, review_bundle wording, best_match_id guard, ambiguous_multiple not counted as matched, text_hint narrowing, blocked_on validator (5 cases), markdown rendering, manifest carry, §0 prepend. Tests live in pdf_oxide because that's where pytest runs alongside the rest of the PDF Lab suite.

## Evidence

R3.1 ZIP bundle for Golden Slice 001 (NIST page 28):
`/tmp/pdf-lab-golden-slices/nist_page_28_printed_page_1.zip` (1.3 MB)

- 9 expected rows → 6 matched / 0 ambiguous / 3 missing / 13 extras
- 3 missing rows flagged in `blocked_on.json` awaiting owner-routing decision

To be attached to WebGPT tab 837342436 via `surf webgpt.submit --no-activate --attach-file` once the §10 trigger fires (explicit "send to web gpt" OR stop-condition trigger (b)).

## Lifecycle

Disposable per the per-round branch hygiene rule. After WebGPT accepts code + evidence: squash-merge or delete. If rejected / superseded: close + delete this branch.

## Worktree note

This branch was created via `git worktree` from `main` so the active feature branches in this clone (`feat/webgpt-no-activate`, `battle/...`, `code-runner/...`, etc.) were not disturbed. The worktree at `/tmp/agent-skills-r3-worktree/` will be removed once the PR is opened.

title: Add /review-extraction skill + GS001 R3 runner
